name: No Bake Peanut Butter Drops
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Sweetened condensed milk = half of a 14-oz can
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate over hot water, removing from heat.
2. Add peanut butter, sweetened condensed milk, salt, and vanilla to the melted chocolate. Stir until well blended.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
4. Chill in the refrigerator until firm.
